_meta.review_notes: Heuristic auto-review 2026-04-22: verified source URLs match a .gov/official domain where possible, rejected items matching industry-convention/proposed-not-enacted/unverified-rate patterns. Remaining entries require secondary admin approval before draft->active flip.

notes: 1. The nalog.gov.ru pages for St. Petersburg (rn78) returned only page titles without substantive content, but the FNS portal for other regions and the tourist tax dedicated page (rn77) confirm all findings. 2. The tourist tax rates beyond 2027 (2028-2029) were set at the federal ceiling level (4% and 5% respectively) but St. Petersburg Law No. 738-158 only explicitly specifies rates through 2027 — rates for 2028-2029 will likely require further legislative action by the city. 3. The general VAT rate in Russia rose from 20% to 22% effective 1 January 2026 (Law No. 425-F3, signed 28 November 2025), but hotel accommodation services are exempt under 0% VAT extended to 2030. 4. The tourist tax applies only to classified accommodation facilities in the federal registry; private apartment/short-term rental operators are not currently covered, though legislative amendments have been discussed to extend coverage. 5. Quarterly reporting: declaration due by 25th of the month following the quarter; payment due by 28th of same month.

rates.authority_name: St. Petersburg Legislative Assembly / Federal Tax Service (FNS)
rates.legal_reference: St. Petersburg Law No. 738-158 of 27.11.2024; Federal Law No. 176-FZ of 12.07.2024, Chapter 33.1 Tax Code RF
rates.source_quote: Закон СПб. № 738-158 установил дифференцированные ставки сезонно, по годам: ... 2026 г. - 1 % (применяется 01.01-31.03, а также 01.10-31.12) и 2 % (применяется 01.04-30.09)

rates.legal_reference: Federal Law No. 176-FZ of 12.07.2024, Art. 418.5 Tax Code RF; St. Petersburg Law No. 738-158
rates.source_quote: минимальная сумма налога не может быть меньше 100 рублей за сутки проживания

rates.authority_name: St. Petersburg Legislative Assembly / Federal Tax Service (FNS)
rates.source_quote: 2026 год — 1% для периодов 01.01–31.03 и 01.10–31.12, а в период 01.04–30.09 налог будет считаться по более высокой ставке — 2%

rates.authority_name: St. Petersburg Legislative Assembly / Federal Tax Service (FNS)
rates.source_quote: 2027 год — 1,5 % для периодов 01.01–31.03 и 01.10–31.12, а в период 01.04–30.09 будет действовать еще более высокое значение — 3%

rates.legal_reference: Federal Laws No. 227-FZ, 228-FZ, 229-FZ of 23 July 2025; Art. 164 p.1 subp. 18-19 Tax Code RF
rates.source_quote: до 31 декабря 2030 года продлевается срок применения налоговой ставки по НДС в размере 0% при реализации услуг по предоставлению мест для временного проживания в гостиницах и иных средствах размещения

rates.legal_reference: St. Petersburg Law No. 419-81 of 28.06.2023 (kurortny sbor / resort fee experiment)
rates.source_quote: взимается курортный сбор в размере 100 руб. на 1 человека в сутки

rules.description: The tourist tax is paid by hotel/accommodation operators (legal entities and individual entrepreneurs), not directly by tourists. The tax is included in the accommodation price. Operators must file quarterly declarations by the 25th of the month following the quarter, and pay by the 28th.
rules.legal_reference: Federal Law No. 176-FZ of 12.07.2024, Chapter 33.1 Tax Code RF; St. Petersburg Law No. 738-158 of 27.11.2024
rules.name: Tourist Tax — Hotel Operator as Taxpayer
rules.source_quote: плательщиками туристического налога будут признаны организации и физлица, которые оказывают услуги по предоставлению мест для временного проживания

rules.description: The tourist tax applies only to accommodation facilities (hotels, hostels, motels, glamping, sanatoriums) that are included in the federal register of classified accommodation facilities (реестр классифицированных средств размещения). Non-classified or private apartment rentals are not subject to the tax.
rules.legal_reference: Art. 418.3 Tax Code RF (as amended by Federal Law No. 176-FZ of 12.07.2024)
rules.name: Tourist Tax — Classified Accommodation Registry Requirement
rules.source_quote: быть включенным в реестр классифицированных средств размещения

rules.description: Federal law exempts certain categories from the tourist tax base: Heroes of the Soviet Union and Russian Federation, full holders of the Order of Glory, veterans and invalids of combat operations (including WWII), disabled persons of groups I and II, disabled children, and other federally protected categories. St. Petersburg Law 738-158 adds further local exemptions including: relatives of deceased war invalids, escorts of group-I disabled persons and disabled children, low-income individuals and families whose per-capita monthly income is below the regional subsistence minimum, and local SPb residents.
rules.legal_reference: Art. 418.4 p.2 Tax Code RF; St. Petersburg Law No. 738-158 Art. 3
rules.name: Federal Exempt Categories — Tourist Tax
rules.source_quote: малоимущим гражданам, местным жителям с пропиской и иным категориям

rules.description: From 2026, St. Petersburg applies differentiated tourist tax rates based on season: off-peak rate (1%) applies from 1 January to 31 March and from 1 October to 31 December; peak rate (2%) applies from 1 April to 30 September. In 2027, off-peak rises to 1.5% and peak to 3%.
rules.name: Tourist Tax — Seasonal Rate Differentiation 2026

rules.description: The tourist tax base is the cost of accommodation services provided to guests, calculated excluding VAT. The minimum tax is 100 RUB per day regardless of the calculated percentage amount. Tax is triggered on the date of full settlement with the guest.
rules.legal_reference: Art. 418.4 p.1 Tax Code RF (Federal Law No. 176-FZ of 12.07.2024)
rules.name: Tourist Tax Base Calculation — Excludes VAT
rules.source_quote: Налоговая база для туристического налога — стоимость оказанной услуги по размещению, проще говоря, цена гостиничного номера или койко-места в хостеле без учета самого налога и НДС

rules.description: The former resort fee experiment (Law No. 419-81 of 28.06.2023) required adult tourists (aged 18+) staying more than 24 hours to pay 100 RUB/person/day separately at check-in. This was replaced by the tourist tax effective 1 January 2025. The resort fee experiment ended on 31 December 2024.
rules.legal_reference: St. Petersburg Law No. 419-81 of 28.06.2023 (expired); Federal Law No. 214-FZ of 29.07.2017
rules.name: Former Resort Fee (Kurortny Sbor) — Paid by Adult Tourists Directly
rules.source_quote: с 1 января 2025 г. курортный сбор официально прекратил действие, уступив место новому налоговому режиму

rules.description: Hotel and accommodation facilities classified in the federal registry can apply 0% VAT to temporary accommodation services (and bundled services in the room price per Annex 4 of Government Resolution No. 1860 of 18.11.2020). Extended until 31 December 2030 by Federal Laws No. 227-FZ, 228-FZ and 229-FZ of 23 July 2025. General VAT rate rose to 22% from 1 January 2026 (up from 20%), but accommodation services retain 0%.
rules.legal_reference: Art. 164 p.1 subp. 18-19 Tax Code RF; Federal Laws No. 227-FZ, 228-FZ, 229-FZ of 23.07.2025
rules.name: VAT 0% on Hotel Accommodation Services — Extended to 2030
rules.source_quote: до 31 декабря 2030 года продлевается срок применения налоговой ставки по НДС в размере 0% при реализации услуг по предоставлению мест для временного проживания в гостиницах и иных средствах размещения

summary: Comprehensive research completed for St. Petersburg, Russia (RU-SPE). 12+ sources checked including nalog.gov.ru, official regional government sites (gov.spb.ru), Russian legal databases (garant.ru, nalog-nalog.ru, spmag.ru), and authoritative news outlets. Key findings: (1) A new Tourist Tax (туристический налог) replaced the former Resort Fee (курортный сбор) effective 1 January 2025, enacted by St. Petersburg Law No. 738-158 of 27 November 2024. The tax is paid by hotel/accommodation operators (not guests directly), calculated as a percentage of accommodation cost excluding VAT, with a minimum of 100 RUB/day. Rates are seasonal and tiered by year: 2025 = 1% flat; 2026 = 1% (off-peak) / 2% (peak Apr-Sep); 2027 = 1.5% (off-peak) / 3% (peak Apr-Sep); federal ceiling reaches 5% in 2029. St. Petersburg is the only federal-significance city to have adopted this tax. (2) The former Resort Fee of 100 RUB/person/day (kurortny sbor) under Law No. 419-81 of 28 June 2023 was REMOVED/expired as of 31 December 2024. (3) VAT on hotel accommodation services remains at 0% (for classified accommodation facilities), extended via Federal Laws 227-FZ/228-FZ/229-FZ of 23 July 2025 to 31 December 2030. General VAT rose to 22% from 1 January 2026 but accommodation services retain 0% for classified hotels. (4) Several exemption categories apply to the tourist tax including veterans, war invalids, disabled persons, Heroes of the Soviet Union/Russia, low-income residents, and SPb residents. Overall confidence: high, with multiple consistent authoritative Russian sources confirming rates and legal references.
